_comment: Endpoint configs for V1 devnet init. Just helius for the first cut — devnet stack ships with one slug. Amounts in USDC base units (6 decimals): 1_000 = $0.001. exposureCapPerHourLamports = max payout from this pool per rolling hour. Same numbers as the mainnet helius row at the time of writing (2026-05-15); diverge if devnet-specific testing warrants different values.
